zh.lifeSummary: 當John Basset於大約1305年出生在英國爾黑阿德爾時，他的父親John Basset22歲，母親Joan de Beaumont18歲。他於大約1365年與Joan de Brailsford在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾黑阿德爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1370年享年67歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾黑阿德爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Basset于大约1305年出生在英国爾黑阿德爾时，他的父亲John Basset22岁，母亲Joan de Beaumont18岁。他于大约1365年与Joan de Brailsford在英国英格兰斯塔福爾黑阿德爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1370年享年67岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾黑阿德爾。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Basset was born about 1305, in Cheadle, Cheshire, England, his father, John Basset, was 22 and his mother, Joan de Beaumont, was 18. He married Joan de Brailsford about 1365, in Cheadle, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1370, at the age of 67, and was buried in Cheadle, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Basset est né environ 1305, à Cheadle, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John Basset, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan de Beaumont, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Brailsford environ 1365, à Cheadle, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1370, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Cheadle, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Basset um 1305 in Cheadle, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Basset 22 und seine Mutter Joan de Beaumont 18. Er hat um 1365 in Cheadle, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Joan de Brailsford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1370 im Alter von 67 Jahren und wurde in Cheadle, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Basset è nato il circa 1305 nel Cheadle, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, John Basset, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Beaumont, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Brailsford circa 1365, nel Cheadle, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. ja.lifeSummary: John Bassetが約1305年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェアドルで生まれた時，父John Bassetは22歳，母Joan de Beaumontは18歳であった。約1365年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアチェアドルでJoan de Brailsfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1370年に67歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアチェアドルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Basset(이)가 대략 1305년 영국 체실르 체아들일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Basset(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Beaumont(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1365년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 체아들일에서 Joan de Brailsford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1370년 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 체아들일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Basset nasceu aproximadamente 1305, em Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Basset, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Beaumont, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Brailsford aproximadamente 1365, em Cheadle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1370, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Cheadle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Basset родился около 1305 г. в местности чидл, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Basset было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Beaumont, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Brailsford около 1365 г. в местности чидл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1370 г. в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности чидл, стаффордшир, Англия.
